name: Bowtie
description: A drawer of dapper bowties cinched at the knot — every redraw re-ties the silk at a fresh angle and pinch.

code.style: --silk2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* tie and knot share one emitted tilt */ --bt: @r(-22deg, 22deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 12%; top: 26%; width: 76%; height: 48%; background: var(--silk2); clip-path: polygon(0% @rand(0%, 12%), 50% @rand(30%, 42%), 100% @rand(0%, 12%), 100% @rand(88%, 100%), 50% @rand(58%, 70%), 0% @rand(88%, 100%)); transform: rotate(@var(--bt)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 44%; top: 41%; width: 12%; height: 18%; border-radius: 26%; background: rgba(30, 24, 20, 0.35); transform: rotate(@var(--bt)); transform-origin: 50% 50%; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
